title: Mayor Sharon F. Owens Announces the Return of Veo Fleet
summary: Mayor Owens announces the seasonal return of Veo micromobility fleet to full capacity as of March 9, 2026, following strong 2025 performance (648,000 rides, 24% growth). Updated operating agreement includes new cargo baskets, accessibility improvements, and underage riding prevention. Program serves residents without car access and supports transit connectivity.

political_signal.description: Mayor champions sustainable transportation and equity-focused mobility as part of broader vision for safer streets and accessible transit connections. Program metrics demonstrate constituent adoption among car-free populations.

processing_notes: Author field listed as 'Unknown' in metadata
Contact email syrops@veoride.com indicates dedicated Veo-Syracuse partnership coordination
Survey data (750 riders, 66% car-free, 52% transit connectors) suggests strong equity impact narrative
Spring promotion code SPRING26 indicates active rider acquisition strategy
No budget figures disclosed beyond $5 promo credit
Operating agreement changes suggest ongoing contract negotiation and community feedback integration
